classes.name: WorkerInfo
classes.docstring:
Information about a worker in the pool.

    Attributes:
        worker: The SandboxWorker instance
        user_id: User ID this worker is serving
        created_at: When the worker was created

classes.name: SandboxOrchestrator
classes.docstring:

    routing execution requests to available workers based on user

classes.name: IPCError
classes.docstring: Error in IPC communication with sandbox process.

classes.name: WorkerStartupError
classes.docstring: Error starting the sandbox worker process.

classes.name: SandboxWorker
classes.docstring:
Manages a single sandbox subprocess.

    The SandboxWorker creates and manages a Python subprocess that runs
    in an isolated environment. Communication uses JSON-RPC over stdin/stdout.

classes.name: SandboxExecutor
classes.docstring:
Executor for handling requests in the sandbox.

    This class handles incoming requests and delegates to the
    appropriate handler (Claude SDK, tools, etc.).

classes.name: IPCHandler
classes.docstring:
Handles JSON-RPC communication over stdin/stdout.

    Reads requests from stdin and writes responses to stdout.
    Uses JSON-RPC 2.0 format for all messages.

classes.name: Severity
classes.docstring: Vulnerability severity levels.

classes.docstring: Represents a security vulnerability.

classes.docstring: Represents an OWASP compliance check.

classes.name: SecurityAuditReport
classes.docstring: Complete security audit report.

classes.name: TokenPayload
classes.docstring:
JWT token payload structure.

    Attributes:

        role: User role (admin, operator, viewer)
        exp: Expiration timestamp
        iat: Issued at timestamp

classes.name: SanitizedInput
classes.docstring: Result of input sanitization.

classes.docstring:

classes.name: Role
classes.docstring: Platform user roles ordered by privilege level.

classes.name: Permission
classes.docstring:
Describes allowed actions on a resource.

    Examples:
        Permission(resource="tool:assess_risk", actions={"execute"})
        Permission(resource="api:chat", actions={"read", "write"})

classes.name: RBACManager
classes.docstring:
Manages role-based permissions.

    Supports wildcard matching: a permission string ending with ``*`` matches
    any resource that shares the same prefix.

    Usage::

        rbac = RBACManager()

classes.name: UserRole
classes.docstring: User roles for tool permission control.

classes.docstring: Result of a tool call validation.

classes.name: _RateLimitEntry
classes.docstring: Tracks call counts within a time window.

classes.name: ToolSecurityGateway
classes.docstring:
Validates all Orchestrator tool calls through four security layers.

    Usage as a standalone validator:
        gateway = ToolSecurityGateway()
        result = await gateway.validate_tool_call
